languages.text: {n}Батошски довольно скалится.{/n} "Все как дома. Силу мы понимаем и уважаем. Я передам ваши слова бойцам".
{n}Batoshski grins broadly.{/n} "Sounds just like home. Strength is something we understand and respect. I'll pass your words along to the troops."
languages.original_text: {n}Батошски довольно скалится.{/n} "Все как дома. Силу мы понимаем и уважаем. Я передам ваши слова бойцам".

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski grins broadly.{/n} "It feels just like home. Strength is something we understand and respect. I'll pass your words along to the fighters."
{n}Batoshski grins broadly.{/n} "Sounds just like home. Strength is something we understand and respect. I'll pass your words along to the troops."

"So it's just like back home? You're strong — and that's why the system won't chew us up. Well, as long as you're on our side. I understand strength. And, luckily, I'm smart enough to know that it's not just about brawn."
{n}Batoshski grins broadly.{/n} "It feels just like home. Strength is something we understand and respect. I'll pass your words along to the fighters."
{n}Batoshski grins broadly.{/n} "Sounds just like home. Strength is something we understand and respect. I'll pass your words along to the troops."

languages.text: 「だから、ここも家と同じなのね。君たちは強いから、このシステムに飲み込まれないんだ。君たちが味方ならね。強さ、わかるよ。それに、幸い、俺は頭もそこそこあるから、力だけじゃないってわかってるんだ」
languages.original_text: "So it's just like back home? You're strong — and that's why the system won't chew us up. Well, as long as you're on our side. I understand strength. And, luckily, I'm smart enough to know that it's not just about brawn."

languages.text: {n}Batoshski genişçe gülümsüyor.{/n} "Tıpkı memleket gibi. Güç anladığımız ve saygı duyduğumuz bir şeydir. Sözlerinizi birliklere ileteceğim."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski grins broadly.{/n} "Sounds just like home. Strength is something we understand and respect. I'll pass your words along to the troops."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski genişçe gülümsüyor.{/n} "Tıpkı memleket gibi. Güç anladığımız ve saygı duyduğumuz bir şeydir. Sözlerinizi birliklere ileteceğim."

languages.text: {n}巴托什斯基咧嘴一笑。{/n}“听起来就像老家一样。力量这东西，我们理解也敬重。我会把您的话转达给士兵们。”
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski grins broadly.{/n} "Sounds just like home. Strength is something we understand and respect. I'll pass your words along to the troops."

traits.locale_text: {n}巴托什斯基咧嘴一笑。{/n}“听起来就像老家一样。力量这东西，我们理解也敬重。我会把您的话转达给士兵们。”

languages.text: {n}Batoshski grinst breit.{/n} "Klingt wie zu Hause. Stärke ist etwas, das wir verstehen und respektieren. Ich lasse die Truppen wissen, was Ihr gesagt habt."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski grins broadly.{/n} "Sounds just like home. Strength is something we understand and respect. I'll pass your words along to the troops."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski grinst breit.{/n} "Klingt wie zu Hause. Stärke ist etwas, das wir verstehen und respektieren. Ich lasse die Truppen wissen, was Ihr gesagt habt."

languages.text: {n}Batoshski vous adresse un grand sourire.{/n} « Comme chez nous. Nous comprenons et respectons la force. Je répéterai vos propos aux troupes. »
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski grins broadly.{/n} "Sounds just like home. Strength is something we understand and respect. I'll pass your words along to the troops."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski vous adresse un grand sourire.{/n} « Comme chez nous. Nous comprenons et respectons la force. Je répéterai vos propos aux troupes. »

languages.text: {n}Batoshski sonríe abiertamente.{/n} «Igual que en casa. La fuerza es algo que entendemos y respetamos. Transmitiré sus palabras a las tropas».
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski grins broadly.{/n} "Sounds just like home. Strength is something we understand and respect. I'll pass your words along to the troops."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski sonríe abiertamente.{/n} «Igual que en casa. La fuerza es algo que entendemos y respetamos. Transmitiré sus palabras a las tropas».
